title: carex biformis var. sterilis
intro: Carex biformis var. sterilis, also known as the barren-stem sedge, is a rare and unique perennial plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat skin conditions, reduce swelling and pain, and support the immune system. Carex biformis var. sterilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
